scripts.docker:build: export $(cat .env | grep -v '#' | grep -v '^$' | xargs) && docker build -f docker/Dockerfile --build-arg UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID_DOCS=$UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID_DOCS --build-arg GITHUB_URL=$GITHUB_URL -t racona-docs-developer:latest .
scripts.docker:build:amd64: export $(cat .env | grep -v '#' | grep -v '^$' | xargs) && docker build -f docker/Dockerfile --platform linux/amd64 --build-arg UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID_DOCS=$UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID_DOCS --build-arg GITHUB_URL=$GITHUB_URL -t racona-docs-developer:latest .
scripts.docker:build:arm64: export $(cat .env | grep -v '#' | grep -v '^$' | xargs) && docker build -f docker/Dockerfile --platform linux/arm64 --build-arg UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID_DOCS=$UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID_DOCS --build-arg GITHUB_URL=$GITHUB_URL -t racona-docs-developer:latest .
